title: prunus × zumbra
intro: Prunus × zumbra, also known as the Zabel plum or Zabel cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a hybrid of Prunus americana and Prunus umbellata, both native to North America. The bark and leaves of Prunus × zumbra have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Prunus × zumbra include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and aiding in digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Prunus × zumbra can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
